titleStmt.title: SII 33.215: original edition by K. Munirathnam and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 215. (A.R. No. B 131 of 1952.) Saṅgamjāgarlamūḍi, Ongole Taluk, Guntur District.

summary.p: Another pillar in the courtyard, Saṅgamēśvara temple.
This is dated Śaka 116[4], Pushya ba. 3, Wednesday corresponding to 1242 A.D., January 10, [The day was Saturday].
Registers an endowment for burning lamps in the temple of Chōḍēśvara-Mahādēva at Chēbrōlu by Āyātabōyuṁḍu, son of Boṁḍḍa-kōṭa Eṟama-śeṭṭi.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī śakavaruṣaṁbulu 1164 nēṁṭi
he puṣyabahula tritiyya budavārāna ma
kara saṁkrāṁtti nimityamuna cēṁbrōli Ayyakula
tilaka cōḍīśvara śrīmahādēvaraku boṁḍḍakōṭa E
ṟṟayaseṭṭi koḍuku Āyātabōyuṁḍu dēvara
dīviyatāṁḍra Akhaṁḍḍadīpa Ārādhānaku mahā
sēnamuna nityamāneṁḍunēyi bōyaṁgalavāru
tama saṁtāna kramamuna Ācaṁdrārkamunu I
dēvara maḍujīrulu grāmanu marusānulunu
Ayyalunu pratīpālana jīyaṁgalavāru svadattaṁ para
dattaṁ vā yo harēti vasuṁdharā saṣṭivarṣasahasrāṇi
viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimi .
Digital edition of SII 33.215 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
